title: Ability to share a Monday Workdoc with a read-only link
excerpt: Similar to how sharing works with board views, I’d like to be able to share a read-only view of a Monday Workdoc.

posts.author: gwheat (Garrett)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to how sharing works with board views, I’d like to be able to share a read-only view of a Monday Workdoc.
